text: Once upon a time there was a girl named Daisy. She loved to wander around town taking photographs. She would go anywhere because the scenery always looked different. She climbed trees. She explored parks. One day she found an old rusty camera left behind. She took a thousand pictures. Then she mailed them to friends back home. They loved it. She knew she'd never sell them.
